glosses.ja: コミュニケーション; 意思疎通

sentences.target: La communication entre nous est difficile.

translations.fr: La communication entre nous est difficile.
translations.es: La comunicación entre nosotros es difícil.
translations.de: Die Kommunikation zwischen uns ist schwierig.
translations.it: La comunicazione tra noi è difficile.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们之间的沟通很困难。
translations.yue: 我哋之間嘅溝通好困難。
translations.pt: A comunicação entre nós é difícil.
translations.vi: Giao tiếp giữa chúng tôi gặp khó khăn.
translations.nl: De communicatie tussen ons is moeilijk.
translations.el: Η επικοινωνία μεταξύ μας είναι δύσκολη.
translations.ja: 私たちの間のコミュニケーションは難しいです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; marks the noun's definiteness.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Preposition introducing the prepositional phrase 'entre nous'.
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; object of the preposition 'entre'.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present indicative; links subject and predicate.
Adjective in predicative position; agrees with the subject in gender/number (fem. sg.).

sentences.target: On travaille notre communication au bureau.

translations.fr: On travaille notre communication au bureau.
translations.en: We’re working on our communication at the office.
translations.es: Estamos trabajando en nuestra comunicación en la oficina.
translations.de: Wir arbeiten im Büro an unserer Kommunikation.
translations.it: Stiamo lavorando sulla nostra comunicazione in ufficio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在办公室改进沟通。
translations.yue: 我哋喺辦公室度改善我哋嘅溝通。
translations.ru: В офисе мы улучшаем наше общение.
translations.pt: Estamos trabalhando na nossa comunicação no escritório.
translations.he: אנחנו עובדים על התקשורת שלנו במשרד.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang cải thiện việc giao tiếp ở văn phòng.
translations.ar: نحن نعمل على تحسين تواصلنا في المكتب.
translations.nl: We werken aan onze communicatie op kantoor.
translations.uk: Ми працюємо над нашою комунікацією в офісі.
translations.hi: हम दफ़्तर में अपने संचार को बेहतर बनाने पर काम कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Pracujemy nad naszą komunikacją w biurze.
translations.el: Δουλεύουμε την επικοινωνία μας στο γραφείο.
translations.nb: Vi jobber med kommunikasjonen vår på kontoret.
translations.id: Kami bekerja untuk memperbaiki komunikasi di kantor.
translations.sv: Vi arbetar med vår kommunikation på kontoret.
translations.ro: Lucrăm la comunicarea noastră la birou.
translations.cs: V kanceláři pracujeme na naší komunikaci.
translations.da: Vi arbejder med vores kommunikation på kontoret.
translations.ja: 私たちはオフィスでコミュニケーションを改善しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; morphologically 3rd person singular (often meaning 'we').
Main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; agrees with 'on'.
Possessive determiner, 1st person plural; singular form modifying 'communication'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'travaille'.
Preposition (contraction of 'à' + 'le'); introduces the locative complement 'au bureau'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au' (location).

sentences.target: La communication passe mal par messages.

translations.fr: La communication passe mal par messages.
translations.en: Communication doesn’t work well over texts.
translations.es: La comunicación por mensajes no funciona bien.
translations.de: Die Kommunikation über Nachrichten funktioniert nicht gut.
translations.it: La comunicazione tramite messaggi non funziona bene.
translations.zh-Hans: 通过消息沟通效果不好。
translations.pt: A comunicação por mensagens não funciona bem.
translations.he: התקשורת דרך הודעות לא עובדת טוב.
translations.vi: Giao tiếp qua tin nhắn không hiệu quả.
translations.ar: التواصل عبر الرسائل لا يعمل بشكل جيد.
translations.nl: Communicatie via berichten werkt niet goed.
translations.hu: Az üzeneteken keresztüli kommunikáció nem működik jól.
translations.hi: संदेशों के जरिए संचार ठीक से नहीं होता.
translations.pl: Komunikacja przez wiadomości nie działa dobrze.
translations.el: Η επικοινωνία μέσω μηνυμάτων δεν πάει καλά.
translations.id: Komunikasi lewat pesan tidak berjalan dengan baik.
translations.sv: Kommunikation via meddelanden fungerar inte bra.
translations.ro: Comunicarea prin mesaje nu merge bine.
translations.da: Kommunikation via beskeder fungerer ikke godt.
translations.fi: Viestintä viestien välityksellä ei toimi hyvin.
translations.ja: メッセージでのコミュニケーションはうまくいません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the subject noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the verb 'passe'.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; states how the communication goes.
Adverb modifying 'passe'; indicates manner.
Preposition introducing the means/instrumental phrase.
Common noun, masculine plural; object of the preposition 'par'.

translations.vi: Chúng tôi thiếu sự giao tiếp.
translations.hi: हमारे बीच संचार की कमी है.
translations.ja: 私たちはコミュニケーションが不足しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the clause.
Main verb, 1st person plural present indicative; used with 'de' to express lack.
Preposition forming the complement 'de communication' after 'manquer'.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of the preposition 'de'.
